notes: I must have sat for several minutes, waiting for the game to load, before realizing it had opened a browser window in the background, trying to link the game to my Epic account. I could not interact with that browser window unless I switched to Desktop mode before playing. I saw no one else mention this.
title: ToeJam & Earl: Back in the Groove!
